item.description:
• Product Studio — new 📦 — upload a product, cut the background, generate a fresh lifestyle scene behind it, and export every social size. All local, all free. Includes goal templates (E-commerce / Social ad / Luxury / Natural), 20 scenes, one-click variations, a brand-logo ad kit, and batch campaigns (a whole product folder in one click).
  • Many more models — the Models panel now shows the full downloadable Draw Things catalog (hundreds of official + community models, no API key needed). Non-commercial models are clearly flagged.
  • Refreshed interface — a modern, responsive left rail and cards with hover effects and logical grouping.
  • Claude integration (MCP) — new expand_image (outpaint / extend the canvas) and vary_image (img2img variation) tools.
  • Fixes — the Models panel now refreshes itself when the engine connects; Home “Recent creations” shows work added outside the app (including Claude/MCP generations).
